name: clawthority
description: Authorization policy engine for Clawthority — semantic authorization, action normalization, audit logging, and HITL approval
author: Clawthority

postInstall.description: Writes data/.installed as an activation marker. Does not run arbitrary commands, fetch remote resources, or touch files outside the plugin's own data/ directory.

inbound.purpose: Slack interactive webhook receiver; bound only when SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET are set

CLAWTHORITY_MODE.description: Install mode. `open` = implicit permit + critical-forbid safety net; `closed` = implicit deny, explicit permits required. Read once at activation; restart to change.

CLAWTHORITY_RULES_FILE.description: Override path to the hot-reloaded rules file (defaults to data/rules.json under the plugin root).

OPENAUTHORITY_MODE.description: Skill-manifest validator mode. `OPEN` demotes manifest validation failures to warnings; `CLOSED` treats them as errors.

OPENAUTHORITY_ALLOW_UNSAFE_LEGACY.description: Set to `1` to permit skills marked `unsafe_legacy` to activate even when their deadline is expired.

OPENAUTH_FORCE_ACTIVE.description: Development/test only. Set to `1` to force policy activation even when data/.installed is missing.

OPENAUTH_BUDGET_LOG_FILE.description: Override path to the budget JSONL file (defaults to data/budget.jsonl under the plugin root).

OPENAUTH_BUDGET_MODEL.description: Model identifier used for cost estimation in the budget tracker.

OPENAUTH_BUDGET_DAILY_LIMIT.description: Daily token limit. Overrides configSchema.budget.dailyTokenLimit when set.

OPENAUTH_BUDGET_WARN_AT.description: Token count at which the budget tracker emits a warning. Overrides configSchema.budget.warnAt when set.

OPENAUTH_BUDGET_HARD_LIMIT.description: Set to `1` to enforce hard budget limits (block subsequent tool calls once a daily limit is exceeded).

OPENAUTH_BUDGET_DAILY_COST_LIMIT.description: Daily cost limit in USD. Active only when OPENAUTH_BUDGET_HARD_LIMIT=1.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram Bot API token used by the HITL Telegram channel. Required only when Telegram HITL is enabled.

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat or group ID that receives HITL approval prompts. Required only when Telegram HITL is enabled.

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Slack Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...). Required only when Slack HITL is enabled.

SLACK_CHANNEL_ID.description: Slack channel ID (not name) that receives HITL approval prompts. Required only when Slack HITL is enabled.

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Slack Signing Secret used to verify inbound interactive webhooks. Required only when Slack HITL is enabled.

SLACK_INTERACTION_PORT.description: Port the Slack interactive webhook server binds to when Slack HITL is enabled.

bundlePath.description: Path to the active bundle directory

proposalPath.description: Path to the bundle proposals directory

auditLogFile.description: Path to the JSONL audit log file

trustedDomains.description: Domains considered trusted for action classification

protectedPaths.description: File-system paths protected from agent access

dailyTokenLimit.description: Soft daily token limit; the token-budget skill warns when usage approaches this threshold

warnAt.description: Token count at which the token-budget skill emits a warning (must be ≤ dailyTokenLimit)

signingSecret.description: Slack Signing Secret for webhook verification

interactionPort.description: Port for the Slack webhook interaction server
